nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 5am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 43. South wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers before 8am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 8am and 9am, then rain likely and patchy fog between 9am and 11am, then rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy. High near 56, with temperatures falling to around 46 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 6 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
